## Editing.EditorContext class

Base implementation of IEditorContext. Provides CRUD operations and semantic validation for pre-validated entities. For raw input handling with converter validation, use ValidatingEditorContext.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class EditorContext<T, TBaseId extends string = string, TId extends string = string> implements IEditorContext<T, TBaseId, TId> 
```
**Implements:** [IEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontext.md)<!-- -->&lt;T, TBaseId, TId&gt;
